REQUIREMENTS

NOTICE OF ADDENDUM: Requirements for this program were updated effective Spring 2026 and have been published on ADDENDA TO THIS CATALOG (https://academiccatalog.umd.edu/undergraduate/ addenda/#Cyber_Physical_Systems).

First & Second Year Prior to being admitted to the Cyber-Physical Systems Engineering major, students should have completed the Engineering LEP gateway courses, basic math/science courses, lower-level General Education requirements, and at least 60 credits.
